basic_details.job_title: HAL ITI Trade Apprentices Recruitment 2026 Notification Out – Walk in for 205 Posts
basic_details.short_information: HAL Recruitment 2026 offers 205 vacancies for ITI Trade Apprentices posts. Eligible candidates with ITI can attend the walk-in from 28-05-2026 to 01-06-2026 through the official HAL website: hal-india.co.in
basic_details.organization_name: Department of Training & Development, Avionics Division, HAL Hyderabad

selection_process: Merit-based on GPA/CGPA marks in SSC/10th (70% weightage) and ITI (30% weightage). No written test or interview.
how_to_apply: Interested and eligible candidates must walk-in on the respective date and reporting time as per the trade-wise schedule at Utsav Sadan Auditorium, Behind Department of Training & Development, Hindustan Aeronautics Limited, Avionics Division, Balanagar, Hyderabad – 500042. There is no separate online application on the HAL website.
seo_tags: Hindustan Aeronautics Limited ITI Apprentices Recruitment 2026
